project.name: IPB Smart Reserve Hub
project.summary: Campus facility reservation platform with React/Vite frontend, FastAPI backend, SQLAlchemy persistence, and workflow-driven reservation processing for student, staff, and super_admin roles.

components.name: Guest Visitor
components.description: Unauthenticated user who can browse public facility data and self-register as a student.

components.name: Student User
components.description: Authenticated student who browses facilities, creates reservations, uploads required files, reviews outcomes, and receives notifications.

components.name: Staff User
components.description: Assigned facility operator who reviews reservation documents, payments, cancellation requests, and manages assigned facilities.

components.name: Super Admin User
components.description: Administrator who manages users, facility governance, reports, booking settings, reviews, and system status.

components.name: Scheduled Deadline Worker
components.description: Background process concept that advances reservation deadlines and emits notifications/audit logs when run.

components.name: Frontend Route Shell
components.description: BrowserRouter + top-level route table for auth, student, staff, super_admin, and reference pages.

components.name: Frontend Providers
components.description: AppProviders creates TanStack Query client and mounts AuthProvider.

components.name: Auth Session Layer
components.description: Stores bearer token in memory + sessionStorage, restores sessions through GET /auth/me, protects role routes, and redirects on 401.

components.name: Frontend HTTP Client
components.description: Shared fetch wrapper that attaches bearer token, handles JSON/FormData, raises ApiError, and supports downloads.

components.name: Notification Surface
components.description: Shared notification dropdown used across role shells; reads /notifications and resolves target links per role.

components.name: Auth Pages
components.description: Login and register pages wired to /auth/login and /auth/register.

components.name: Student Surfaces
components.description: Student home, catalog, facility detail, reservation create steps, reservation list/detail, document workflow, review, cancellation, and profile screens.

components.name: Staff Surfaces
components.description: Staff home/list, reservation detail/decision, facility list/edit, and schedule pages.

components.name: Super Admin Surfaces
components.description: Dashboard, users, facilities governance, reports, and system/settings pages.

components.name: Reference And Harness Pages
components.description: Design/reference routes and harness pages used for visual implementation and testing rather than end-user workflows.

components.name: Frontend Reservation Workflow Mappers
components.description: Client-side mapping helpers for reservation status projections and staff reservation presentation.

components.name: FastAPI App Factory
components.description: create_app loads settings and delegates construction to HttpApplicationModule.

components.name: HTTP Application And Runtime Registry
components.description: Builds FastAPI, enables permissive CORS, creates DB schema on startup, assembles grouped dependencies, and registers all route groups.

components.name: Account Route Group
components.description: Auth, current-user, admin-managed user CRUD-lite, and shell endpoints.

components.name: Public Facility Route Group
components.description: Public categories, catalog, detail, calendar, availability, and reservation time selection endpoints.

components.name: Reservation Workflow Route Groups
components.description: Reservation submission/list/detail/cancellation, approval letter workflow, payment workflow, and review submission/moderation endpoints.

components.name: Staff Operation Route Groups
components.description: Assigned reservation queue/list/detail, facility schedule, and assigned facility management endpoints.

components.name: Super Admin Route Groups
components.description: Dashboard, reports, booking settings, organization units, audit logs, system status, and facility governance endpoints.

components.name: User Account Module
components.description: Student registration, admin-created users, login, refresh, token resolution, active-user lookup, and academic profile projection.

components.name: Facility Catalog Module
components.description: Public facility categories, catalog results, facility detail projection, and public calendar projection.

components.name: Facility Availability Module
components.description: Determines open-hours fit, blackout overlap, and blocking reservation overlap for a candidate reservation time.

components.name: Reservation Time Selection Module
components.description: Applies booking-window and local time rules, then combines them with facility availability into one validation result.

components.name: Reservation Module
components.description: Reservation submission, student list/detail, pre-approval cancellation, cancellation-request workflow, notifications, audit, and student-facing workflow projection mapping.

components.name: Facility Reservation Lifecycle
components.description: Owns reservation status transitions, due-date assignment, effective completed status, overdue verification, and expiration rules.

components.name: Approval Letter Module
components.description: Lazily generates approval-letter PDFs, stores/downloads private files, handles signed-letter upload, and processes staff document review decisions.

components.name: Payment Module
components.description: Exposes student payment instructions, stores payment receipts, and handles staff payment approval/rejection.

components.name: Review Module
components.description: Student review submission/deletion, staff facility review listing/statistics, and admin review moderation.

components.name: Notification Module
components.description: Creates student and staff/admin notifications for reservation workflow events and maps notification targets to frontend routes by role.

components.name: Staff Reservation Operations Module
components.description: Read-model projection module for staff queue/list/detail/schedule screens.

components.name: Facility Management Module
components.description: Facility governance, staff assignment, assigned facility updates, images, open hours, blackouts, and related audit logging.

components.name: Organization Unit Management Module
components.description: Create, update, activate/deactivate, and list active organization units.

components.name: Booking Settings Module
components.description: Loads default+stored booking settings, validates admin updates, and provides policy values to auth and reservation workflows.

components.name: Super Admin Dashboard Module
components.description: Aggregates high-level counts, administrator list, facility governance, recent audit activity, and system status.

components.name: Super Admin Report Module
components.description: Date-range aggregate KPIs, reservation status counts, and per-day trend calculation for reports.

components.name: System Status Module
components.description: Reports backend/database health plus storage/worker placeholders.

components.name: Deadline Worker Module
components.description: Scans reservations, applies lifecycle deadline transitions, records audit entries, and emits notifications.

components.name: SQLAlchemy Repository Adapters
components.description: Write/read adapters for users, booking settings, facilities, reservations, staff operations, notifications, reviews, organization units, and audit logs.

components.name: ORM Models
components.description: Single SQLAlchemy model module containing users, facilities, categories, assignments, reservations, reviews, audit logs, notifications, organization units, and private file metadata tables.

components.name: Pydantic API Schemas
components.description: Request/response schemas for accounts, facilities, reservations, reviews, settings, audit, notifications, and admin aggregates.

components.name: Private File Storage
components.description: Only concrete adapter in code is InMemoryPrivateStorage; approval letters, signed letters, and payment receipts store bytes here via ReservationPrivateFileModule.

components.name: Approval Letter PDF Generator
components.description: Minimal internal PDF generator used to create reservation approval letters without external PDF service dependency.

components.name: Database Runtime
components.description: SQLAlchemy engine/session factory with SQLite defaults for local use and PostgreSQL expected in deployment. Schema is created with Base.metadata.create_all().

components.name: Browser Session Storage
components.description: Client-side storage used for bearer token mirroring between reloads.

components.name: Frontend Build/Test Pipeline
components.description: Vite dev/build, Vitest unit/integration tests, and Playwright screenshot/e2e runs with local Vite webServer.

components.name: Backend Build/Test Pipeline
components.description: uv-managed dependency sync, pytest behavior tests, dev seed command, and uvicorn app startup.

components.name: Railway Deployment Target
components.description: Backend deployment target configured with NIXPACKS builder, uvicorn start command, and /health health check.

dependencies.reason: App.tsx mounts login/register pages.
App.tsx mounts student pages behind RequireRole.
App.tsx mounts staff pages behind RequireRole.
App.tsx mounts super_admin pages behind RequireRole.
AppProviders nests AuthProvider inside QueryClientProvider.
AuthProvider registers auth token provider and unauthorized handler for shared HTTP client.
Token is mirrored to sessionStorage using SESSION_TOKEN_KEY.
NotificationSurface fetches and marks notifications through apiRequest.
Student pages query public and authenticated backend endpoints through apiRequest/apiDownload.
Staff pages fetch queues/details/schedules and post review/facility actions.
Super admin pages fetch dashboard, governance, reports, reviews, users, settings, and system status.
Student reservation detail/workflow screens normalize backend workflow projections client-side.
Staff detail pages map reservation statuses and display metadata client-side.
create_app delegates actual FastAPI construction to HttpApplicationModule.
HttpApplicationModule.register_account_routes(...)
HttpApplicationModule.register_facility_routes(...)
HttpApplicationModule registers reservation, approval-letter, payment, and review route groups.
HttpApplicationModule registers staff reservation operations and facility management route groups.
HttpApplicationModule registers admin settings, reports, dashboard, audit, org-unit, and system-status routes.
Runtime.create_schema calls Base.metadata.create_all on startup.
Account routes call UserAccountModule methods for registration, login, token refresh, current-user, and admin-managed users.
Public facility/category/detail/calendar endpoints call FacilityCatalogModule.
Availability endpoint calls FacilityAvailabilityModule.
Reservation-time-selection endpoint calls ReservationTimeSelectionModule.
Reservation and cancellation endpoints call ReservationModule.
Approval-letter endpoints call ApprovalLetterModule.
Payment endpoints call PaymentModule.
Review endpoints call ReviewModule.
Queue/list/detail/schedule routes call StaffReservationOperationsModule.
Assigned facility endpoints call FacilityManagementModule.
Dashboard route calls SuperAdminDashboardModule.
Reports route calls SuperAdminReportModule.
Settings endpoints load and update BookingSettingsModule.
Organization-unit endpoints call OrganizationUnitManagementModule.
Health and system-status endpoints call SystemStatusModule.
UserAccountModule uses SqlAlchemyUserRepository and booking settings repository through factories.
FacilityCatalogModule uses SqlAlchemyFacilityCatalogReader.
FacilityAvailabilityModule uses SqlAlchemyFacilityAvailabilityReader.
ReservationTimeSelectionModule calls FacilityAvailabilityModule after local/booking rules.
Time selection policy uses booking-settings lead/advance windows.
Reservation submission re-runs ReservationTimeSelectionModule before write path.
Submission and cancellation operations mutate state via FacilityReservationLifecycleModule.
Reservation submission uses NotificationModule when configured.
ReservationModule uses SqlAlchemyReservationRepository via module factory assembly.
Signed-letter upload and staff review change reservation workflow status via FacilityReservationLifecycleModule.
ApprovalLetterModule writes generated PDFs and signed letters through storage/private-file module.
Approval letters are generated lazily by ApprovalLetterPdfGenerator.
Document upload/approval/rejection sends student and staff notifications.
Payment upload and staff approval/rejection change workflow status via FacilityReservationLifecycleModule.
Payment receipt uploads go through ReservationPrivateFileModule and PrivateStorage.
Payment upload/approval/rejection sends student and staff notifications.
StaffReservationOperationsModule uses dedicated projection repository adapter.
FacilityManagementModule uses facility management repository adapter for governance, assignments, images, hours, and blackouts.
Dashboard asks UserAccountModule for total users and administrator list.
Dashboard includes facility governance from FacilityManagementModule.
Dashboard embeds SystemStatus.
SuperAdminReportModule selects Reservation rows directly with SQLAlchemy Session.
Repository adapters read/write SQLAlchemy ORM entities from app/models/__init__.py.
Base metadata tables map to configured database engine.
Deadline worker applies lifecycle deadline transitions to reservations.
Deadline worker sends expiration/completion/overdue notifications.
Worker opens a fresh SQLAlchemy session and iterates all reservations.
README and Railway config start uvicorn with app.main:create_app --factory.
Vite, Vitest, and Playwright all operate on the frontend route shell and pages.
Railway start command runs uvicorn against app.main:create_app.

steps.action: LoginPage submits credentials through AuthProvider.login using POST /auth/login.
Account route forwards login to UserAccountModule and returns a token response.
UserAccountModule verifies password, checks active status, and issues JWT via JwtAccountSessionCodec.
SqlAlchemyUserRepository reads the user record from the database.
AuthProvider stores token in memory and sessionStorage, then validates it with GET /auth/me on login and page restore.

flows.name: Student Browse Catalog And Facility Detail

steps.action: Student home and catalog pages fetch /facility-categories and /facilities; facility detail fetches /facilities/{id} and /facilities/{id}/calendar.
Public facility routes dispatch category, catalog, detail, and calendar requests.
FacilityCatalogModule shapes public projections, featured ordering, price labels, and public review summaries.
SqlAlchemyFacilityCatalogReader loads active facilities, categories, images, reviews, and public calendar reservations.
Facility, FacilityCategory, FacilityImage, FacilityReview, and Reservation tables supply the data.

flows.name: Student Validate Time And Submit Reservation

steps.action: StudentReservationCreatePages fetches facility calendar and organization units, calls /reservation-time-selection, then POSTs /facilities/{id}/reservations.
Time-selection request hits ReservationTimeSelectionModule through public facility routes.
ReservationTimeSelectionModule applies 5-minute increment, duration, same-day, booking-window, and facility-availability rules.
Reservation submission route forwards payload to ReservationModule.

ReservationModule revalidates time selection, checks active facility and organization unit, applies overlap conflict guard, creates reservation, assigns document-upload due date, and records audit/notification.
SqlAlchemyReservationRepository persists the reservation and checks overlap against blocking statuses.

flows.name: Approval Letter, Signed Letter Upload, And Staff Document Review

steps.action: Student document workflow pages fetch reservation detail and approval-letter metadata, download generated letters, and upload signed approval letters as FormData.
Approval-letter routes expose student get/download/upload and staff approve/reject/download endpoints.
ApprovalLetterModule lazily generates the PDF, stores metadata, validates signed-letter file type/size, updates status to pending_document_review, and processes staff approval/rejection.
ApprovalLetterPdfGenerator renders a minimal PDF using reservation fields and Asia/Jakarta formatting.
Generated approval letters and signed uploads are stored in PrivateStorage.
Staff reservation detail page fetches /staff/reservations/{id}, downloads signed files, and posts review decisions to approve_url/reject_url.

flows.name: Payment Receipt Upload And Staff Payment Review

steps.action: Student payment pages fetch /student/reservations/{id}/payment and upload receipt files to /payment-receipt.
Payment routes expose student payment metadata/download/upload and staff receipt download/approve/reject endpoints.
PaymentModule ensures the reservation is payable, validates receipt file type/size, stores the receipt, and processes staff review decisions.
Payment receipts are stored and downloaded through ReservationPrivateFileModule + PrivateStorage.
Lifecycle changes reservation status to approved or rejected based on payment review outcome.

flows.name: Student Cancellation Request And Staff Decision

steps.action: Student cancellation page loads reservation detail and posts reason to /student/reservations/{id}/cancellation-request.
Reservation routes expose student cancellation-request plus staff cancellation approve/reject endpoints.
ReservationModule verifies the reservation belongs to the student, requires approved effective status, stores the reason, and returns workflow projection plus refund warning for paid reservations.
Staff detail page loads cancellation projection and posts approval/rejection to the provided review action URLs.
Lifecycle marks the reservation cancelled or returns it to approved with a cancellation_rejection_reason.

flows.name: Staff Queue, Schedule, Detail, And Assigned Facility Management

steps.action: Staff pages fetch /staff/reservations/verification-queue, /staff/reservations, /staff/reservations/{id}, /staff/facilities, and /staff/facilities/{id}/schedule; edit pages patch facilities and add images/open-hours/blackouts.
Staff route groups dispatch reservation operations and assigned facility management requests.
StaffReservationOperationsModule returns tailored queue/list/detail/schedule projections with workflow-specific document/payment/cancellation fields.
FacilityManagementModule checks assignment access, updates assigned facilities, and mutates images/open-hours/blackouts.
Dedicated staff operation and facility management repository adapters query assigned-reservation and assigned-facility data.

flows.name: Super Admin Dashboard, Users, Reports, Governance, And Settings

steps.action: Super admin pages fetch dashboard, users, governance, reports, audit logs, review moderation, booking settings, and system status; some pages also post user activation, user creation, staff assignment, review moderation, and settings updates.
Admin route groups dispatch the corresponding requests by feature area.
SuperAdminDashboardModule aggregates counts, administrator list, facility governance, recent activity, and system status.
SuperAdminReportModule aggregates date-range reservation KPIs, status counts, and trend points.
UserAccountModule provides paginated admin user management and active/inactive toggles.
Booking settings updates change values used by account policies and reservation workflow timings.

flows.name: Deadline Processing, Expiration, Completion, And Notifications

steps.action: DeadlineWorkerModule opens a new session and scans all reservations.
Lifecycle decides whether each reservation should become completed, overdue_verification, or expired.
Deadline transitions emit reservation-completed, expired, or overdue-verification notifications.
Audit log and notification repositories persist side effects before session commit.

unresolved_or_uncertain.statement: The only concrete private file adapter in code is InMemoryPrivateStorage, so generated approval letters and uploaded private files are not durable across process restarts.
A deadline worker module exists, but no deployed scheduler/worker process entrypoint was found in repo config; SystemStatus also reports worker as not_configured.
Database schema is created with Base.metadata.create_all() at app startup, and no migration framework/configuration was detected.
NotificationModule maps super_admin reservation notifications to /super-admin/reservations/{reservation_id}, but no matching frontend route exists in App.tsx.
No .github workflow directory or other CI pipeline config was found; the observable pipeline is local commands plus Railway deployment.
Facility images are stored as plain URL strings, but the durable origin/CDN strategy is not defined in code. This likely relies on an external image host chosen outside the repo.
